About our Annapolis care

Home care built for Annapolis families.

Annapolis families know quality when they see it — and they expect the same standard in home care. Vitalis HealthCare brings Joint Commission-certified, RN-supervised care to Annapolis and surrounding Anne Arundel County communities. We're a Maryland-licensed agency with the credentials, the training, and the genuine commitment that families in this community deserve.

Annapolis and Anne Arundel County have a rapidly growing senior population — and one of Maryland's highest rates of long-term care insurance coverage. Whether your family is paying privately, using VA benefits, long-term care insurance, or Maryland Medicaid Waiver, Vitalis works with all major payment types and can help you understand what your loved one qualifies for.

We serve families in Historic Annapolis, Parole, Hillsmere Shores, Riva, Edgewater, Arnold, and Severna Park.

Joint Commission
Gold Seal certified agency
All Pay Types
VA · Medicaid · LTC Insurance · Private
RN Supervised
All care overseen by a registered nurse

What we offer in Annapolis

Every level of care, under one trusted roof.

We focus on three core services — so every client gets expert, well-supervised care, not a stretched generalist agency trying to do everything at once.

Companion Care
Someone to be there

Real conversation, shared errands, engagement, and the steady, friendly presence that keeps your loved one connected to life — and not lonely or isolated.

Personal Care
Help with daily life, done with dignity

Bathing, dressing, grooming, and mobility assistance — professional, respectful, and delivered in a way that preserves your loved one's independence and self-esteem.

Skilled Nursing
Clinical care at home

Registered nurses providing wound care, medication management, health monitoring, and post-surgical support — hospital-quality care without leaving the comfort of home.

★★★★★

“The professionalism and attention to detail is unlike anything we experienced before. Through the reliable, high quality care we receive, our health situation has improved dramatically. We strongly recommend Vitalis to any family looking for real quality.”

E. Adaku · Maryland client

Common questions

What Annapolis families ask us most

Every family's situation is different — and we're happy to answer questions specific to yours. Call or WhatsApp us any time. No obligation, no pressure.

Call 240.716.6874WhatsApp Us
Do you serve Annapolis and Anne Arundel County?

Yes — we serve Annapolis and surrounding Anne Arundel County communities including Parole, Hillsmere Shores, Riva, Edgewater, Arnold, and Severna Park. Call us to confirm coverage for your specific address.

How quickly can care begin in Annapolis?

In most cases, we can arrange care within 24–48 hours of an initial consultation. For urgent hospital discharges, we work to get support in place as quickly as possible — sometimes the same day.

Do you accept Long-Term Care Insurance for Annapolis clients?

Yes. Most Long-Term Care Insurance policies cover our home care services. We'll work with your insurer directly to confirm your benefits and handle the documentation needed to activate coverage.

Can your nurses work with my parent's Annapolis-area doctor?

Absolutely. Our clinical team communicates with primary care physicians, specialists, and hospital discharge teams to make sure care is coordinated and nothing falls through the cracks.

What makes Vitalis different from a national franchise?

We're a locally rooted Maryland agency — not a franchise with rotating staff and 800-number support. You get a dedicated case manager, consistent caregivers, and direct access to our clinical team. Families tell us that personal accountability is what they value most.

Ready to get started in Annapolis?

Call us, WhatsApp us, or fill out a short form. We'll answer your questions and arrange a free care consultation — usually the same day.

Request a Free ConsultationCall 240.716.6874WhatsApp Us

Vitalis HealthCare Services, LLC

A family-owned, Maryland-licensed home care agency serving Silver Spring and communities across Montgomery County, Baltimore County, and Anne Arundel County. Our mission: improve quality of life for our clients in the comfort of their homes.
